title: Integrity Validation Layer
description: Defines the mandatory integrity assertions, recovery exit criteria, and readiness gating that must pass before recovery completes and execution authority is restored.
purpose: Ensure recovery operations never declare completion without formal proof that all integrity invariants are satisfied and the runtime is safe to resume.

invariants.description: Recovery may not be marked complete until all exit criteria pass.
Thaw is blocked if any integrity validation phase fails.

invariants.expression: integrity_gate.passed AND audit_gate.passed AND thaw_authorization_gate.passed AND mode_transition_gate.passed
invariants.description: All readiness gates must pass in sequence before execution resumes.

recovery_exit_criteria.description: Mandatory assertions that must all pass before recovery may exit. Any single failure blocks thaw.

criteria.description: At most one execution may be active, and if active, it must hold a valid lock.
Checkpoints must form an unbroken, monotonically increasing chain.
All projections must have been generated at or after the recovery start time.
Lock state must be consistent across all surfaces that track it.
Reconstruction from journal must produce identical state to reconstruction from checkpoints.

criteria.assertion: ∀transition: transition.from ∈ valid_states AND transition.to ∈ valid_states AND transition.guard ∈ valid_guards
criteria.description: All recorded transitions must reference valid states and guards.
All registered invariants must pass validation.
All governed files must validate against their declared schemas.
Every repair in the incident must have a corresponding audit event in the append-only journal.
All drifts detected during the incident must be marked resolved.
The proposed mode transition after recovery must be valid per the operational mode transition matrix.

integrity_suite.description: The complete validation suite executed during integrity validation.

phases.name: surface_consistency_check
phases.description: Cross-reference all state surfaces for consistency.

phases.name: checkpoint_lineage_validation
phases.description: Validate checkpoint chain monotonicity and schema conformance.

phases.name: authority_reconstruction_replay
phases.description: Reconstruct state from journal and checkpoints. Verify determinism.

phases.name: invariant_validation
phases.description: Run all registered invariants against current state.

phases.name: schema_validation
phases.description: Validate all governed files against their schemas.

phases.name: projection_consistency
phases.description: Verify projections are fresh and consistent with canonical state.

phases.name: audit_trail_validation
phases.description: Verify all repairs have audit events and journal is append-only.

readiness_gating.description: Gating mechanism that controls whether execution may resume after recovery.

gates.description: All integrity suite phases must pass.
Recovery audit must be finalized and emitted to journal.
Explicit thaw authorization must be emitted. This is the only gate requiring explicit authorization.
Proposed next mode must be valid per transition matrix.
